name: ibl-agent-workflow
description: IBL cross-agent workflow skills: write a session-handoff document so a fresh agent can continue the work.

interface.shortDescription: Session-handoff and continuity skills for IBL agents.
interface.longDescription: IBL Agent Workflow packages reusable, host-agnostic skills for moving work between agent sessions. The session-handoff skill writes a redacted continuity document to the OS temp directory so a fresh agent can resume without re-deriving context.
defaultPrompt: Write a handoff document so a fresh agent can continue this work.
Summarise this session and save a handoff to my temp directory.
Prepare a continuation doc with suggested skills for the next agent.
